name: Voronoi 图
subject: math
domain_name: 几何与三角 / Geometry & Trig / Geometry & Trig
curriculum_points: Construct and interpret Voronoi diagrams from a given set of sites, and determine equations of edges and vertices (AO2).
Apply Voronoi diagrams to solve optimization problems, such as finding the nearest neighbor or locating a new facility.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像
